description: NovaBuild is a commercial construction firm specializing in sustainable office buildings and mixed-use developments across the Midwest.

services.name: Commercial Construction
services.description: Full-service ground-up construction for offices and retail buildings.

services.name: Sustainable Building
services.description: LEED-certified green construction with energy-efficient systems.

services.name: Interior Fit-Outs
services.description: Custom interior buildouts for corporate offices and restaurants.

services.name: Project Management
services.description: End-to-end project oversight including budgeting and scheduling.
